name: GOLFTEC Henderson
address: 1570 W Horizon Ridge Pkwy #100, Henderson, NV 89012
about: GOLFTEC Henderson is a dedicated golf training facility that specializes in using advanced technology to provide personalized coaching and practice opportunities. As part of the GOLFTEC network, the venue focuses on data-driven swing analysis and improvement through launch monitor technology and professional instruction. The Henderson location appears to offer a controlled, tech-focused environment for golfers looking to improve their skills with expert guidance.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to professional golf coaching and swing analysis
Technology-driven practice sessions with detailed performance data
Structured learning environment for skill improvement

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides all necessary equipment, including clubs, so you don't need to bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are permitted at GOLFTEC Henderson.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: Typical 18-hole simulator sessions at GOLFTEC locations last approximately 60-90 minutes depending on pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC offers junior golf programs and coaching, making it suitable for youth golfers under proper supervision.
